141 P1AL P1AL_VENTILATOR 38ai(P1al)Special Care - Ventilator or Respirator CHAR 1 Indicates the patient received ventilator or respirator treatment. Includes any type of electrically or pneumatically powered closed system mechanical ventilatory support devices. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
